description_long: This is a large, ornate trophy cup with a metallic silver finish and a wide, open mouth. The cup features two prominent, upward-curving handles on either side, each with a decorative flourish at the top. A thin gold band encircles the upper portion of the cup, adding a touch of elegance. The cup is mounted on a dark, square pedestal base, which appears to be made of polished wood and includes a metallic nameplate on the front. The overall design is classic and ceremonial, suitable for awards or recognition events. The surface is highly reflective, giving it a prestigious and eye-catching appearance.
description: A large, silver trophy cup with ornate handles, a gold band, and a dark wooden base with a nameplate.
description_view_0: Front view showing both ornate handles, the gold band, and the nameplate on the wooden base.
description_view_1: Side view with one handle visible and the gold band encircling the cup, nameplate not visible.
description_view_2: Rear view similar to the front, both handles visible but no nameplate present.
description_view_3: Opposite side view with one handle visible, gold band present, and no nameplate.
